---
---

<link rel="stylesheet" href="styles.css" type="text/css">

James (Jay) Brophy MEng MD FRCP(c) FACC FCCS FCAHS PhD<br>
Professor of Medicine & Epidemiology (McGill)<br>
Royal Victoria Hospital<br>
1001 Decarie Blvd Room C04.1410<br>
Montreal (Qc) H4A 3J1<br>
Telephone: 514 934-1934 ext. 36771, Fax: 514 843-1493<br>
e-mail: james.brophy@mcgill.ca<br>
website:james brophy<br>
twitter: @brophyj<br>
